goal: Make intelligence serving and portfolio loading include the active chip workspace when commands are executed inside this repo, so serve-intelligence does not return an empty block for repo-local work.
constraints: Preserve explicit search_dir behavior for portfolio loading
Keep the relevance floor for unrelated external chips
behavioral_changes: Default portfolio loading now includes the current chip workspace when the process is running inside a chip repo.
serve-intelligence now falls back to the active workspace chip instead of returning an empty context block when lexical selection finds nothing.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_chip_runtime.py tests/test_chip_context_injector.py tests/test_chip_advisor.py tests/test_chip_mcp_server.py tests/test_hooks.py -q

PYTHONPATH=src python -m chip_labs.cli serve-intelligence "stabilize packaging and preserve hook compatibility" --max-chips 2 --style concise --output research/meta/serve_intelligence_output_phase7d_2026-03-21.json
follow_up: Capture the before/after serving outputs as a real operational validation tranche.
Review advisory chip ranking separately if off-domain consulted chips continue to appear in packaging-oriented queries.
